breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's 28-domain dashboard: 47.69σ significance paired with R² = 0.030
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Our Part 4.1 now shows the dome author's Live Power panel claims 47.69σ Fisher-combined significance — coexisting with R² = 0.0298 and Pearson r = 0.1727. The 520 historical p-values feeding Fisher's method decompose as 28 domains × 19 time-series repeats, violating Fisher's independence assumption both across domains (shared λg constant) and within domains (repeated measurement). One ruler, many rooms, zero discriminating power.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: New statistical wedge: 47.69σ coexisting with near-zero R² is the clearest single indicator that the Fisher method is doing something other than measuring independent predictive power.
